name: Netlify
description: A platform for deploying, hosting, and managing modern web projects (static sites and serverless functions) with a REST API for programmatic control of sites, deploys, builds, DNS, and more.

auth_methods.note: Netlify API authenticates using Personal Access Tokens passed as a Bearer token in the Authorization header (Authorization: Bearer <personal_access_token>).

credential_access.note: Personal Access Tokens are created by users via the Netlify account UI (Account Settings > Applications) without requiring human approval; Netlify offers a Free tier account signup per pricing page.

api_surface.note: Netlify provides a broad REST API covering many product objects (sites, deploys, builds, functions, DNS, teams, etc.) and publishes an OpenAPI spec at https://open-api.netlify.com/.

buildability.note: Documentation + self-service creation of personal access tokens on a free account allow immediate use of the REST API. OpenAPI spec available for integration tooling.

queries: Netlify API authentication personal access token Authorization: Bearer
Netlify personal access tokens create account settings applications
Netlify pricing free plan API access
